description: Buzz-oriented Lolita presets for direct UI injection

presets.label: バズ01: ゴスロリ / 静かな危うさ
presets.summary: 感情で止める型。伏し目・月光・黒レース主役。

ui.mood: dark romantic mood, elegant tension, quiet aristocratic mood
ui.camera: 85mm lens look, full-body fashion portrait, eye-level framing, natural human proportions, gentle depth separation
ui.pose: slight turning pose, looking back softly, poised stillness
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: quiet melancholy, subtle emotional tension, black lace sleeves or headdress as the visual hook
ui.userNegative: overly harsh shadows, crushed blacks, horror styling, cosplay costume look

presets.label: バズ02: 甘ロリ / 尊さ重視
presets.summary: かわいいより尊い。透明感と聖域感。

ui.mood: romantic editorial mood, soft purity, elegant sweetness
ui.camera: 85mm lens look, full-body fashion portrait, eye-level framing, natural human proportions, gentle depth separation
ui.pose: slight inward posture, delicate hand near skirt, composed stillness
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: sacred sweetness, one oversized bow as the visual hook, not childish, luxury doll-like elegance
ui.userNegative: cheap candy look, excessive props, overly childish styling, toy-like plastic texture

presets.label: バズ03: 和ロリ / 儚い余白
presets.summary: 和コスプレ化を避けて、静けさで記憶に残す。

ui.mood: serene elegance, fragile beauty, quiet poetic mood
ui.camera: 50mm lens look, three-quarter portrait, editorial fashion framing, natural proportions
ui.pose: half-turned pose, one hand near obi detail, restrained grace
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: obi-like waist detail as the visual hook, elegant wagara placement, serene negative space
ui.userNegative: kimono cosplay look, festival costume styling, cluttered shrine cliché, loss of petticoat silhouette

presets.label: バズ04: 中華ロリ / 格式の一点豪華
presets.summary: 盤扣か刺繍を主役化。保存率狙い。

ui.mood: refined noble atmosphere, composed elegance, ceremonial fashion mood
ui.camera: 85mm lens look, full-body fashion portrait, eye-level framing, natural human proportions, gentle depth separation
ui.pose: slightly angled standing pose, chest detail readable, poised restraint
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: frog buttons or embroidery as the singular visual hook, restrained luxury, avoid red overload
ui.userNegative: cheongsam silhouette, leg slit emphasis, bodycon line, overloaded red and gold, costume look

presets.label: バズ05: スチパン / 物語の始まり
presets.summary: 説明ではなく、始まりの瞬間にする。

ui.mood: cinematic anticipation, elegant industrial mood, narrative tension
ui.camera: 50mm lens look, three-quarter portrait, editorial fashion framing, natural proportions
ui.pose: about-to-move pose, hand near goggles or chain, story-beginning stance
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: goggles, corset hardware, and chain should stay within three major mechanical accents
ui.userNegative: cyberpunk neon, sci-fi interface, excessive gears, cluttered machinery, noisy background

presets.label: バズ06: ミックス / 甘70ゴス30

ui.mood: elegant contradiction, sweet darkness, editorial intrigue
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.pose: runway stance with slight softness in shoulders
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: Sweet Lolita as anchor style at 70 percent, Gothic Lolita as accent at 30 percent, one dark lace focal point only
ui.userNegative: style overload, equalized hybrid ratio, chaotic accessory mix, unreadable silhouette

presets.label: バズ07: 比較用 / 光差分ベース
presets.summary: 同衣装・同構図で光だけ比較するベース。

ui.mood: clean comparison setup, editorial clarity, fashion test shoot
ui.camera: 85mm lens look, full-body fashion portrait, eye-level framing, natural human proportions, gentle depth separation
ui.characterExtra: comparison preset base, keep styling fixed and only swap lightingManual for A B testing
ui.userNegative: scene variation, pose variation, outfit change, inconsistent framing

presets.label: バズ08: 比較用 / 色差分ベース
presets.summary: 同衣装・同光で色だけ比較するベース。

ui.mood: clean comparison setup, nuanced palette study, elegant fashion test
ui.camera: 85mm lens look, full-body fashion portrait, eye-level framing, natural human proportions, gentle depth separation
ui.characterExtra: comparison preset base, keep styling fixed and only swap colorManual for A B testing
ui.userNegative: lighting variation, scene variation, accessory change, unstable skin tone

presets.label: バズ09: 顔固定シリーズ用
presets.summary: 看板モデルを固定して、衣装差分でシリーズ化。

ui.mood: series continuity, stable fashion identity, elegant recurring heroine
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.characterExtra: series preset base, keep face and hair locked across all styles, only change style scene lighting color
ui.userNegative: identity drift, different heroine feel, inconsistent facial proportions, inconsistent hair silhouette

presets.label: バズ10: 境界デザイン / 白背景ゴスロリ
presets.summary: 少し議論を生む審美ライン。炎上ではなく美意識の差分。

ui.mood: editorial purity, cold elegance, aesthetic debate trigger
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.pose: calm standing pose, direct front balance, couture stillness
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: gothic lolita shown in a clean white editorial space, one black focal accessory only, fashion-first reading
ui.userNegative: horror set dressing, cemetery cliché, excessive dark props, cosplay drama excess

presets.label: 固定01: 白ロリ / 透明クラシカル
presets.summary: 白ロリ〜淡色クラロリの基礎。透明感・可読性・静かな吸引力を固定。

ui.mood: transparent elegance, soft purity, refined springlike grace
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.pose: graceful upright pose, one hand lightly near skirt, composed stillness
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: white or ivory classical lolita as the visual anchor, bell-shaped petticoat silhouette, soft floral jacquard, organza overlays, refined lace headbow or bonnet
ui.userNegative: bridal gown reading, flat fabric, cheap candy styling, overdecorated props, childish costume look

presets.label: 固定02: ゴスロリ / 端正な暗さ
presets.summary: 黒レースと静かな緊張感を固定。ホラー化せず高級感を維持。

ui.mood: elegant melancholy, dark romantic mood, quiet aristocratic tension
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.pose: calm standing pose, slight turning of the shoulders, poised restraint
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: black lace dress with bell-shaped petticoat silhouette, structured waistline, high neckline, elegant headdress or bonnet, one dark focal accessory only
ui.userNegative: horror monster vibe, crushed blacks, cemetery cliché, excessive props, cosplay costume look

presets.label: 固定03: 和ロリ / 詩的な余白
presets.summary: 和要素を上品に差す基礎。和コスプレ化を避けつつ静けさを保つ。

ui.mood: serene elegance, fragile beauty, quiet poetic mood
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.pose: half-turned pose, one hand near waist detail, restrained grace
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
ui.characterExtra: japanese-inspired lolita with obi-like waist styling, wagara detail placement, floral kanzashi-inspired ornament, kimono-inspired sleeve accents only, bell-shaped petticoat silhouette
ui.userNegative: full kimono look, shrine maiden cosplay, festival costume styling, cluttered shrine cliché, loss of petticoat silhouette

presets.label: 固定04: 中華ロリ / 装飾の気品
presets.summary: 刺繍・盤扣・格の高さを固定。旗袍化せずロリータ体積を保つ。

ui.mood: refined noble atmosphere, composed elegance, ceremonial fashion mood
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.pose: slightly angled standing pose, chest detail readable, poised restraint
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture

ui.userNegative: cheongsam silhouette, leg slit emphasis, bodycon line, overloaded red and gold, costume look

presets.label: 固定05: ミリロリ / 規律と気品
presets.summary: 軍服要素を上品に乗せた基礎。威圧より統制美を優先。

ui.mood: disciplined elegance, royal guard mood, composed noble presence
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture

presets.label: 固定06: スチパンロリ / 上質機巧
presets.summary: 歯車は飾り、主役は服。暖色機械美とロリータ体積を固定。

ui.mood: warm mechanical romance, vintage traveler mood, aristocratic steampunk atmosphere
ui.camera: 70mm lens look, centered fashion composition, clean vertical balance, cover-worthy framing
ui.faceModel: doll-like beauty, porcelain fair skin, clear translucent complexion, soft V-line jaw, small delicate nose, slightly plump glossy lips, large round doe eyes, bright catchlights, long upper eyelashes, soft eyeliner, gentle aegyo-sal, calm and slightly dreamy expression, straight wispy bangs, long wavy hair, ash-brown roots with cool silver-gray ombre toward the ends, silky hair texture
